creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Mon, 19 Jun 2000 13:00:21 -0700 (PDT),
I wrote:
> I'd note that these beta versions are not as stabe as the previously
> released version, 2.0.
> 
> As for 2.0.1 RC1 and RC2, neither of them could stand a 12-hour long run
> and they just crashed themselves.  Also, I'd add that neigher of them did
> seem to recover its sanity from the crash and they led the whole system
> to death, while 2.0 release could stand more than 24 hours, plus it did
> recover the crashes of RC1/RC2 smoothly.  A big difference in stability.

Here I meant that it (RC1 or RC2) couldn't resume or even reboot with
a broken suspended image, and got frozen on VM startup.
